India Women Hockey Team Hold Scotland To 2-2 Draw In World Cup Qualifier

Mar 10, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

India Women Hockey Team Hold Scotland To 2-2 Draw In World Cup Qualifier

The India women’s national field hockey team held Scotland to a tense 2-2 draw in the FIH Hockey World Cup Qualifiers, maintaining their position at the top of Pool B thanks to a superior goal difference.

You can read the full original article on 8jj.com here:
👉 India Women Hockey Team Hold Scotland To 2-2 Draw —
